hBEC RNA-Seq Analysis - Differential Expression

MJR

2026-02-15

1 Setup & Configuration

1.1 Load Libraries & Functions

# Source all configuration and function definitions
source("R/_load_all.R")
## ✓ General utility functions loaded
## ✓ Inflammatory analysis functions loaded
## ✓ RNA-seq plotting functions loaded
## 
## ╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
## ║  ✓ Configuration and all functions loaded successfully            ║
## ║                                                                    ║
## ║  Available modules:                                                ║
## ║    • General utility functions                                     ║
## ║    • Inflammatory analysis functions                               ║
## ║    • RNA-seq analysis functions                                    ║
## ║    • Plotting & visualization functions                            ║
## ║                                                                    ║
## ║  Project directories verified                                      ║
## ╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
# Additional libraries specific to RNA-seq analysis
library(DESeq2)
library(edgeR)
library(statmod)
library(variancePartition)
library(BiocParallel)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(eulerr)
library(ggrepel)
library(rvest)
library(factoextra)

cat("✓ RNA-seq analysis environment loaded\n")
## ✓ RNA-seq analysis environment loaded

2 Data Loading & Preparation

2.1 Load Raw Data Files

# Load raw counts
raw_seq <- read_csv(here::here(PATH_DATA_RAW, "30_999361309_genes_v2.csv"))

# Load metadata
metadata_MJR1_191 <- read_csv(here::here(PATH_DATA_RAW, "2023_MJR1_191_metadata.csv"))

# Subset MJR samples only
mjr_seq <- raw_seq %>%
  select(Geneid, starts_with("MJR")) %>%
  rename_all(~gsub("MJR-", "MJR_", .))

cat("✓ Raw data loaded\n")
## ✓ Raw data loaded
cat("  - Genes:", nrow(mjr_seq), "\n")
##   - Genes: 50037
cat("  - Samples:", ncol(mjr_seq) - 1, "\n")
##   - Samples: 79

2.2 Filter Low-Abundance Genes

# Remove samples with 90% or more zeroes
mjr_seq <- mjr_seq[, colMeans(mjr_seq != 0) > 0.1]

# Apply background filtering using function
mjr_seq_filtered <- filter_genes(mjr_seq, background_threshold = GENE_BACKGROUND_THRESHOLD)

# Remove samples for incomplete donor (DD007T)
drop_cols <- c("MJR_146", "MJR_148", "MJR_152", "MJR_154", "MJR_158", 
               "MJR_160", "MJR_162", "MJR_164", "MJR_166")
mjr_seq_filtered <- mjr_seq_filtered %>% select(-any_of(drop_cols))

cat("✓ Gene filtering complete\n")
## ✓ Gene filtering complete
cat("  - Retained:", nrow(mjr_seq_filtered), "genes\n")
##   - Retained: 24388 genes
cat("  - Removed:", nrow(mjr_seq) - nrow(mjr_seq_filtered), "low-abundance genes\n")
##   - Removed: 25649 low-abundance genes
cat("  - Final sample count:", ncol(mjr_seq_filtered) - 1, "\n")
##   - Final sample count: 69

2.3 Prepare Metadata

# Subset metadata to match filtered samples
mjr_seq_samples <- colnames(mjr_seq_filtered)[-1]  # Exclude Geneid column

meta_data_subset <- metadata_MJR1_191 %>%
  filter(SAMPLEID %in% mjr_seq_samples) %>%
  select(SAMPLEID, EXPOSURE, SEX, PATIENTCODE) %>%
  mutate(
    EXPOSURE = gsub(" ", "_", EXPOSURE),
    EXPOSURE = gsub("Red_Oak_(5|25)", "RedOak_\\1", EXPOSURE),
    EXPOSURE = factor(EXPOSURE, levels = unique(EXPOSURE)),
    SEX = factor(SEX),
    PATIENTCODE = factor(PATIENTCODE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(match(SAMPLEID, mjr_seq_samples))  # Match order to seq data

# Set reference level
meta_data_subset$EXPOSURE <- relevel(meta_data_subset$EXPOSURE, ref = "PBS_Control")

cat("✓ Metadata prepared\n")
## ✓ Metadata prepared
cat("  - Samples:", nrow(meta_data_subset), "\n")
##   - Samples: 69
cat("  - Exposures:", length(levels(meta_data_subset$EXPOSURE)), "\n")
##   - Exposures: 10
cat("  - Donors:", length(unique(meta_data_subset$PATIENTCODE)), "\n")
##   - Donors: 7

3 Quality Control & Exploratory Analysis

3.1 PCA Plot

# Prepare data for PCA
seq_transposed <- mjr_seq_filtered %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Geneid, names_to = "Sample", values_to = "Expression") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Geneid, values_from = Expression) %>%
  left_join(meta_data_subset, by = c("Sample" = "SAMPLEID")) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var = "Sample")

# Convert to matrix for normalization
counts_matrix <- as.matrix(t(seq_transposed[, 1:(ncol(seq_transposed) - 3)]))

# Create DGEList and normalize
dataset <- DGEList(counts_matrix, group = seq_transposed$PATIENTCODE)
dataset <- calcNormFactors(dataset)
lcpm <- cpm(dataset, log = TRUE)

# Run PCA
pca_res <- prcomp(t(lcpm), center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)

# Plot with factoextra
fviz_pca_ind(
  pca_res,
  label = "none",
  habillage = seq_transposed$EXPOSURE,
  palette = color_exposure,
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.type = 'convex'
) +
  ggtitle("PCA - Sample Clustering by Exposure") +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank()
  )

save_plot("PCA_exposure_clustering.png", last_plot(), width = 10, height = 8)
## Saved: output/figures//PCA_exposure_clustering.png

3.2 Sample Correlation Dendrogram

# Dendrogram analysis for sample QC
# Set eval=TRUE to run this during full QC

lcpm_combined <- as.data.frame(cbind(seq_transposed[, 1:2], t(lcpm)))
exposure_list <- as.list(unique(as.character(lcpm_combined$EXPOSURE)))

# Create dendrograms for each exposure group
dendrograms <- lapply(exposure_list, function(exposure) {
  tmp <- lcpm_combined %>% filter(EXPOSURE == exposure)
  names <- rownames(tmp)
  
  tmp <- tmp %>%
    select(-c(1:2)) %>%
    sapply(as.numeric) %>%
    as.data.frame(row.names = names)
  
  tmp_dend <- cor(t(tmp))
  tmp_dend <- as.dendrogram(hclust(as.dist(1 - tmp_dend)))
  
  par(mar = c(4, 1, 1, 12))
  plot(tmp_dend, main = as.character(exposure), horiz = TRUE) +
    abline(v = 0.25, lty = 2)
})

cat("✓ Dendrogram analysis complete\n")

4 Normalization & Transformation

4.1 Normalize Counts

# Median-of-ratios normalization
counts_matrix <- as.matrix(mjr_seq_filtered[, -1]) + 1  # Add pseudocount

normalized_counts <- normalize_counts(counts_matrix)
normalized_counts <- as.data.frame(normalized_counts)
normalized_counts$Geneid <- mjr_seq_filtered$Geneid

# Reorder to put Geneid first
normalized_counts <- normalized_counts[, c("Geneid", setdiff(names(normalized_counts), "Geneid"))]

cat("✓ Median-of-ratios normalization complete\n")
## ✓ Median-of-ratios normalization complete
# Export
write_csv(normalized_counts, here::here(PATH_DATA_PROCESSED, "MJR_seq_normalized.csv"))

4.2 Variance Stabilizing Transformation

# Create DESeq2 object for VST
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts_matrix,
  colData = data.frame(condition = rep(1, ncol(counts_matrix))),
  design = ~ 1
)

# Estimate size factors and apply VST
dds <- estimateSizeFactors(dds)
vst_counts <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)
vst_matrix <- assay(vst_counts)

# Convert to data frame
vst_counts_df <- as.data.frame(vst_matrix)
vst_counts_df$Geneid <- mjr_seq_filtered$Geneid
vst_counts_df <- vst_counts_df[, c("Geneid", setdiff(names(vst_counts_df), "Geneid"))]

cat("✓ VST transformation complete\n")
## ✓ VST transformation complete
# Export
write_csv(vst_counts_df, here::here(PATH_DATA_PROCESSED, "MJR_seq_vst.csv"))

5 Differential Expression Analysis

Note: The following chunks perform heavy computation (1-2 hours total).
- Set eval=TRUE when ready to run the full DEG analysis
- Results are cached and saved to avoid re-running

5.1 Prepare for DEG Analysis

# Filter metadata: remove untreated controls and incomplete donor
seq_degs <- seq_transposed %>%
  filter(EXPOSURE != "Untreated_Control", PATIENTCODE != "DD007T")

# Create proper count matrix (genes as rows, samples as columns)
counts_for_deg <- as.matrix(t(seq_degs[, 1:(ncol(seq_degs) - 3)]))
colnames(counts_for_deg) <- rownames(seq_degs)

# Metadata for DEG analysis
meta_deg <- seq_degs %>%
  select(EXPOSURE, PATIENTCODE, SEX) %>%
  mutate(
    EXPOSURE = factor(EXPOSURE),
    PATIENTCODE = factor(PATIENTCODE),
    SEX = factor(SEX)
  )

# Create DGEList object
dataset_MJR <- DGEList(counts_for_deg, group = meta_deg$EXPOSURE)

cat("✓ Data prepared for DEG analysis\n")
## ✓ Data prepared for DEG analysis
cat("  - Genes:", nrow(counts_for_deg), "\n")
##   - Genes: 24388
cat("  - Samples:", ncol(counts_for_deg), "\n")
##   - Samples: 62

5.2 DREAM Analysis: Exposure Effects

# ============================================================================
# EXPOSURE EFFECTS (NO SEX INTERACTION)
# ============================================================================
# Set eval=TRUE to run this analysis (takes ~1 hour)

param_MJR <- SnowParam(DREAM_N_CORES, "SOCK", progressbar = TRUE)

# Define model
model_MJR <- ~ 0 + EXPOSURE + (1 | PATIENTCODE)

# Define contrasts
contrasts_exposure <- c(
  Peat5_vs_PBS = "(EXPOSUREPeat_5 - EXPOSUREPBS_Control)",
  Peat25_vs_PBS = "(EXPOSUREPeat_25 - EXPOSUREPBS_Control)",
  Euc5_vs_PBS = "(EXPOSUREEucalyptus_5 - EXPOSUREPBS_Control)",
  Euc25_vs_PBS = "(EXPOSUREEucalyptus_25 - EXPOSUREPBS_Control)",
  Pine5_vs_PBS = "(EXPOSUREPine_5 - EXPOSUREPBS_Control)",
  Pine25_vs_PBS = "(EXPOSUREPine_25 - EXPOSUREPBS_Control)",
  RO5_vs_PBS = "(EXPOSURERedOak_5 - EXPOSUREPBS_Control)",
  RO25_vs_PBS = "(EXPOSURERedOak_25 - EXPOSUREPBS_Control)",
  Peat25_vs_Euc25 = "(EXPOSUREPeat_25 - EXPOSUREEucalyptus_25)",
  Peat25_vs_Pine25 = "(EXPOSUREPeat_25 - EXPOSUREPine_25)",
  Peat25_vs_RO25 = "(EXPOSUREPeat_25 - EXPOSURERedOak_25)",
  Euc25_vs_Pine25 = "(EXPOSUREEucalyptus_25 - EXPOSUREPine_25)",
  Euc25_vs_RO25 = "(EXPOSUREEucalyptus_25 - EXPOSURERedOak_25)",
  Pine25_vs_RO25 = "(EXPOSUREPine_25 - EXPOSURERedOak_25)"
)

# Create contrast matrix
list_MJR <- makeContrastsDream(model_MJR, meta_deg, contrasts = contrasts_exposure)

# Calculate voom with Dream weights
dream <- voomWithDreamWeights(dataset_MJR, model_MJR, meta_deg, BPPARAM = param_MJR)

# Variance partition analysis
form <- ~ (1 | PATIENTCODE) + (1 | EXPOSURE)
vp <- fitExtractVarPartModel(dream, form, meta_deg)
plotVarPart(sortCols(vp))

# Fit linear model
dream_fit <- dream(dream, model_MJR, meta_deg, list_MJR)
dream_fit <- eBayes(dream_fit)

# Extract DEGs
dream_DEGs <- lapply(names(contrasts_exposure), function(x) {
  top <- topTable(dream_fit, coef = x, sort.by = "P", n = Inf)
  data.frame(
    log2FC = top$logFC,
    P.Value = top$P.Value,
    adj.P.Val = top$adj.P.Val,
    Expression = top$AveExpr,
    row.names = rownames(top)
  )
})
names(dream_DEGs) <- names(contrasts_exposure)

# Save results
saveRDS(list(fit = dream_fit, degs = dream_DEGs, voom = dream, vp = vp),
        here::here(PATH_DATA_PROCESSED, "dream_exposure_results.rds"))

cat("✓ DREAM exposure analysis complete\n")

5.3 DREAM Analysis: Sex × Exposure Interaction

# ============================================================================
# SEX × EXPOSURE INTERACTION
# ============================================================================
# Set eval=TRUE to run this analysis (takes ~1 hour)

# Filter out incomplete donor
seq_sex <- seq_degs %>% filter(PATIENTCODE != "DD007T")

# Create interaction variable
seq_sex$EXPOSURE_SEX <- paste(seq_sex$EXPOSURE, seq_sex$SEX, sep = "_")

# Prepare data
counts_sex <- as.matrix(t(seq_sex[, 1:(ncol(seq_sex) - 4)]))
colnames(counts_sex) <- rownames(seq_sex)

meta_sex <- seq_sex %>%
  select(EXPOSURE_SEX, PATIENTCODE, EXPOSURE, SEX) %>%
  mutate(
    EXPOSURE_SEX = factor(EXPOSURE_SEX),
    PATIENTCODE = factor(PATIENTCODE)
  )

dataset_MJR_sex <- DGEList(counts_sex, group = meta_sex$EXPOSURE_SEX)

# Define model
model_MJR_sex <- ~ 0 + EXPOSURE_SEX + (1 | PATIENTCODE)

# Define contrasts
contrasts_sex <- c(
  Peat5_vs_PBS_M = "(EXPOSURE_SEXPeat_5_M - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_M)",
  Peat25_vs_PBS_M = "(EXPOSURE_SEXPeat_25_M - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_M)",
  Euc5_vs_PBS_M = "(EXPOSURE_SEXEucalyptus_5_M - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_M)",
  Euc25_vs_PBS_M = "(EXPOSURE_SEXEucalyptus_25_M - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_M)",
  Pine5_vs_PBS_M = "(EXPOSURE_SEXPine_5_M - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_M)",
  Pine25_vs_PBS_M = "(EXPOSURE_SEXPine_25_M - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_M)",
  RO5_vs_PBS_M = "(EXPOSURE_SEXRedOak_5_M - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_M)",
  RO25_vs_PBS_M = "(EXPOSURE_SEXRedOak_25_M - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_M)",
  Peat5_vs_PBS_F = "(EXPOSURE_SEXPeat_5_F - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_F)",
  Peat25_vs_PBS_F = "(EXPOSURE_SEXPeat_25_F - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_F)",
  Euc5_vs_PBS_F = "(EXPOSURE_SEXEucalyptus_5_F - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_F)",
  Euc25_vs_PBS_F = "(EXPOSURE_SEXEucalyptus_25_F - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_F)",
  Pine5_vs_PBS_F = "(EXPOSURE_SEXPine_5_F - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_F)",
  Pine25_vs_PBS_F = "(EXPOSURE_SEXPine_25_F - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_F)",
  RO5_vs_PBS_F = "(EXPOSURE_SEXRedOak_5_F - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_F)",
  RO25_vs_PBS_F = "(EXPOSURE_SEXRedOak_25_F - EXPOSURE_SEXPBS_Control_F)"
)

list_MJR_sex <- makeContrastsDream(model_MJR_sex, meta_sex, contrasts = contrasts_sex)

# Calculate voom weights
dream_sex <- voomWithDreamWeights(dataset_MJR_sex, model_MJR_sex, meta_sex, BPPARAM = param_MJR)

# Variance partition
form_sex <- ~ (1 | PATIENTCODE) + (1 | EXPOSURE) + (1 | SEX)
vp_sex <- fitExtractVarPartModel(dream_sex, form_sex, meta_sex)
plotVarPart(sortCols(vp_sex))

# Fit model
dream_fit_sex <- dream(dream_sex, model_MJR_sex, meta_sex, list_MJR_sex)
dream_fit_sex <- eBayes(dream_fit_sex)

# Extract DEGs
dream_DEGs_sex <- lapply(names(contrasts_sex), function(x) {
  top <- topTable(dream_fit_sex, coef = x, sort.by = "P", n = Inf)
  data.frame(
    log2FC = top$logFC,
    P.Value = top$P.Value,
    adj.P.Val = top$adj.P.Val,
    Expression = top$AveExpr,
    row.names = rownames(top)
  )
})
names(dream_DEGs_sex) <- names(contrasts_sex)

# Save results
saveRDS(list(fit = dream_fit_sex, degs = dream_DEGs_sex, voom = dream_sex, vp = vp_sex),
        here::here(PATH_DATA_PROCESSED, "dream_sex_results.rds"))

cat("✓ DREAM sex interaction analysis complete\n")

5.4 Load Pre-computed Results

# Load pre-computed DEG results if they exist
if (file.exists(here::here(PATH_DATA_PROCESSED, "dream_exposure_results.rds"))) {
  dream_results <- readRDS(here::here(PATH_DATA_PROCESSED, "dream_exposure_results.rds"))
  dream_DEGs <- dream_results$degs
  cat("✓ Loaded pre-computed exposure DEG results\n")
  cat("  - Contrasts:", length(dream_DEGs), "\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠ No pre-computed exposure results found. Run deg-exposure chunk with eval=TRUE\n")
}
## ⚠ No pre-computed exposure results found. Run deg-exposure chunk with eval=TRUE
if (file.exists(here::here(PATH_DATA_PROCESSED, "dream_sex_results.rds"))) {
  dream_sex_results <- readRDS(here::here(PATH_DATA_PROCESSED, "dream_sex_results.rds"))
  dream_DEGs_sex <- dream_sex_results$degs
  cat("✓ Loaded pre-computed sex interaction DEG results\n")
  cat("  - Contrasts:", length(dream_DEGs_sex), "\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠ No pre-computed sex results found. Run deg-sex-exposure chunk with eval=TRUE\n")
}
## ⚠ No pre-computed sex results found. Run deg-sex-exposure chunk with eval=TRUE

6 DEG Classification & Summary

6.1 Classify DEGs

# Combine all DEG results into one data frame
combine_deg_results <- function(deg_list, add_gene_col = TRUE) {
  combined <- lapply(names(deg_list), function(name) {
    df <- deg_list[[name]]
    if (add_gene_col) df$X <- rownames(df)
    df$file_name <- name
    df$sample_name <- sub("_.*", "", name)
    df$Sex <- ifelse(grepl("_F$", name), "Female",
                     ifelse(grepl("_M$", name), "Male", NA))
    return(df)
  })
  bind_rows(combined)
}

# Combine exposure and sex DEGs
if (exists("dream_DEGs")) {
  combined_degs_exposure <- combine_deg_results(dream_DEGs)
}

if (exists("dream_DEGs_sex")) {
  combined_degs_sex <- combine_deg_results(dream_DEGs_sex)
}

# Merge all
if (exists("combined_degs_exposure") && exists("combined_degs_sex")) {
  combined_degs <- bind_rows(combined_degs_exposure, combined_degs_sex)
} else if (exists("combined_degs_exposure")) {
  combined_degs <- combined_degs_exposure
} else {
  cat("⚠ No DEG results loaded\n")
}
## ⚠ No DEG results loaded
# Classify DEGs
if (exists("combined_degs")) {
  combined_degs <- combined_degs %>%
    mutate(
      DEG = case_when(
        log2FC >= LOG2FC_CUTOFF & adj.P.Val < ADJ_P_CUTOFF ~ "UP",
        log2FC <= -LOG2FC_CUTOFF & adj.P.Val < ADJ_P_CUTOFF ~ "DOWN",
        TRUE ~ "NO"
      )
    )
  
  cat("✓ DEG classification complete\n")
  
  # Summary table
  deg_summary <- combined_degs %>%
    filter(DEG != "NO") %>%
    group_by(sample_name, Sex, DEG) %>%
    summarise(n_genes = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = DEG, values_from = n_genes, values_fill = 0)
  
  print(deg_summary)
}

6.2 Export DEG Results

if (exists("combined_degs")) {
  # Export full results
  write_csv(combined_degs, here::here(PATH_OUTPUT_TABLES, "all_deg_results.csv"))
  
  # Export significant DEGs only
  sig_degs <- combined_degs %>% filter(DEG != "NO")
  write_csv(sig_degs, here::here(PATH_OUTPUT_TABLES, "significant_degs.csv"))
  
  # Export by fuel type (high dose only)
  degs_by_fuel <- combined_degs %>%
    filter(is.na(Sex), grepl("25", sample_name), DEG != "NO") %>%
    select(X, log2FC, P.Value, adj.P.Val, Expression, sample_name)
  write_csv(degs_by_fuel, here::here(PATH_OUTPUT_TABLES, "degs_by_fuel.csv"))
  
  # Export by sex (high dose only)
  degs_by_sex <- combined_degs %>%
    filter(!is.na(Sex), grepl("25", sample_name), DEG != "NO") %>%
    select(X, log2FC, P.Value, adj.P.Val, Expression, sample_name, Sex)
  write_csv(degs_by_sex, here::here(PATH_OUTPUT_TABLES, "degs_by_sex.csv"))
  
  cat("✓ DEG results exported\n")
}

7 Visualization

7.1 Volcano Plots: Fuel Type

if (exists("combined_degs")) {
  # Filter for high-dose fuel comparisons
  fuel_degs <- combined_degs %>%
    filter(is.na(Sex), grepl("25_vs_PBS", file_name)) %>%
    mutate(sample_name = case_when(
      sample_name == "Euc25" ~ "Eucalyptus 25 µg/cm²",
      sample_name == "Peat25" ~ "Peat 25 µg/cm²",
      sample_name == "Pine25" ~ "Pine 25 µg/cm²",
      sample_name == "RO25" ~ "Red Oak 25 µg/cm²",
      TRUE ~ sample_name
    ))
  
  # Add labels for top genes
  fuel_degs <- fuel_degs %>%
    group_by(file_name, DEG) %>%
    mutate(
      delabel = case_when(
        DEG == "UP" & row_number(adj.P.Val) <= 6 ~ X,
        DEG == "DOWN" & row_number(adj.P.Val) <= 6 ~ X,
        X %in% highlighted_genes ~ X,  # Always label highlighted genes
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # Create volcano plot
  p_volcano_fuel <- plot_volcano_deg(
    data = fuel_degs,
    facet_by = "sample_name",
    title = "Differential Gene Expression by Fuel Type"
  )
  
  print(p_volcano_fuel)
  save_plot("volcano_plot_fuel_type.png", p_volcano_fuel, width = 14, height = 8)
}

7.2 Volcano Plots: Sex Comparison

if (exists("combined_degs")) {
  # Filter for high-dose sex comparisons
  sex_degs <- combined_degs %>%
    filter(!is.na(Sex), grepl("25_vs_PBS", file_name)) %>%
    mutate(sample_name = case_when(
      sample_name == "Euc25" ~ "Eucalyptus 25 µg/cm²",
      sample_name == "Peat25" ~ "Peat 25 µg/cm²",
      sample_name == "Pine25" ~ "Pine 25 µg/cm²",
      sample_name == "RO25" ~ "Red Oak 25 µg/cm²",
      TRUE ~ sample_name
    ))
  
  # Add labels
  sex_degs <- sex_degs %>%
    group_by(file_name, DEG) %>%
    mutate(
      delabel = case_when(
        DEG == "UP" & row_number(adj.P.Val) <= 6 ~ X,
        DEG == "DOWN" & row_number(adj.P.Val) <= 6 ~ X,
        X %in% highlighted_genes ~ X,
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # Create volcano plot
  p_volcano_sex <- plot_volcano_deg_sex(
    data = sex_degs,
    title = "Differential Gene Expression by Sex and Fuel Type"
  )
  
  print(p_volcano_sex)
  save_plot("volcano_plot_sex.png", p_volcano_sex, width = 14, height = 10)
}

7.3 UpSet Plots: DEG Overlap

if (exists("combined_degs")) {
  # Prepare data for UpSet plot
  degs_by_fuel_upset <- combined_degs %>%
    filter(is.na(Sex), grepl("25_vs_PBS", file_name), DEG != "NO") %>%
    distinct(X, sample_name) %>%
    mutate(present = TRUE) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = sample_name, values_from = present, values_fill = FALSE)
  
  # Create UpSet plot
  p_upset <- plot_upset_degs(degs_by_fuel_upset, title = "DEG Overlap by Fuel Type")
  print(p_upset)
  
  save_plot("upset_plot_fuel_overlap.png", p_upset, width = 12, height = 8)
}

7.4 Gene Expression Barplots

if (exists("vst_counts_df")) {
  # Select genes of interest
  genes_of_interest <- c("IL1A", "SPDEF", "CYP1A1", "TXNRD1")
  
  # Plot gene expression
  p_gene_expr <- plot_gene_expression_bars(
    vst_data = vst_counts_df,
    metadata = meta_data_subset,
    genes = genes_of_interest
  )
  
  print(p_gene_expr)
  save_plot("gene_expression_barplots.png", p_gene_expr, width = 12, height = 4)
}

## Saved: output/figures//gene_expression_barplots.png

8 GSEA Pathway Analysis

8.1 Load GSEA Results

# Define folder containing GSEA HTML results
folder_path_gsea <- here::here("GSEA_results")

if (dir.exists(folder_path_gsea)) {
  html_files <- list.files(path = folder_path_gsea, pattern = "\\.html$", full.names = TRUE)
  
  # Read and parse HTML files
  html_content <- lapply(html_files, read_html)
  names(html_content) <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(html_files))
  
  # Extract tables
  gsea_tables <- lapply(html_content, function(html) {
    table <- html %>% html_element("table")
    if (!is.null(table)) html_table(table) else NULL
  })
  
  # Combine into single data frame
  gsea_results <- bind_rows(
    lapply(names(gsea_tables), function(name) {
      if (!is.null(gsea_tables[[name]])) {
        df <- gsea_tables[[name]]
        df$File_Name <- name
        return(df)
      }
    })
  )
  
  # Clean column names
  colnames(gsea_results) <- c("Number", "Pathway", "Details", "Size", "ES", "NES", 
                               "NOM_pval", "FDR_qval", "FWER_pval", "RANK_AT_MAX", 
                               "LEADING_EDGE", "File_Name")
  
  # Add metadata
  gsea_results <- gsea_results %>%
    mutate(
      sample_name = sub("_.*", "", File_Name),
      Sex = ifelse(grepl("_F_", File_Name), "Female",
                   ifelse(grepl("_M_", File_Name), "Male", NA)),
      FDR_qval = as.numeric(FDR_qval)
    )
  
  cat("✓ GSEA results loaded\n")
  cat("  - Files:", length(html_files), "\n")
  cat("  - Total pathways:", nrow(gsea_results), "\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠ GSEA results folder not found\n")
}
## ⚠ GSEA results folder not found

8.2 GSEA Pathway Barplots

if (exists("gsea_results")) {
  # Filter for significant pathways
  gsea_sig <- gsea_results %>%
    filter(FDR_qval < FDR_THRESHOLD, !grepl("_(F|M)_", File_Name))
  
  # Plot top pathways by fuel type
  p_gsea_fuel <- plot_gsea_barplot(
    gsea_data = gsea_sig,
    n_top = 12,
    facet_by = "sample_name"
  )
  
  print(p_gsea_fuel)
  save_plot("gsea_pathways_fuel.png", p_gsea_fuel, width = 14, height = 8)
}

8.3 GSEA Dot Plot

if (exists("gsea_results")) {
  # Filter for priority pathways
  gsea_priority <- gsea_results %>%
    filter(FDR_qval < FDR_THRESHOLD_HIGH, 
           Pathway %in% priority_pathways)
  
  # Create dot plot
  p_gsea_dot <- plot_gsea_dotplot(gsea_priority)
  
  print(p_gsea_dot)
  save_plot("gsea_dotplot.png", p_gsea_dot, width = 12, height = 8)
}
